query:
INSERT INTO
    user_hauls (
        fiskeridir_vessel_id,
        call_sign,
        gear_id,
        start_ts,
        start_fuel_liter,
        config,
        barentswatch_user_id
    )
SELECT
    a.fiskeridir_vessel_id,
    $1,
    $2,
    $3,
    $4,
    $5,
    $6
FROM
    active_vessels a
WHERE
    a.call_sign = $1
RETURNING
    user_haul_id AS "id: UserHaulId",
    fiskeridir_vessel_id AS "vessel_id: FiskeridirVesselId",
    gear_id AS "gear: Gear",
    start_ts,
    start_fuel_liter,
    config
